data.body:
## SC6 Calibration Results (ticket-clarity-check.sh)

Calibration run completed against 20 closed tickets with description >= 200 chars and 14 tickets with description < 100 chars.

### Well-formed Tickets (desc >= 200 chars) — Target: >=15/20 pass
| Ticket | Score | Verdict |
|--------|-------|---------|
| 0076-6a7d | 7 | pass |
| 04c7-c270 | 7 | pass |
| 064a-4684 | 4 | fail |
| 0848-5a15 | 6 | pass |
| 0ee5-60dd | 6 | pass |
| 0f9b-6641 | 7 | pass |
| 10bc-ccfb | 4 | fail |
| 1328-37a1 | 7 | pass |
| 148e-61c8 | 7 | pass |
| 16d4-f1f6 | 7 | pass |
| 1c7f-9523 | 7 | pass |
| 1fd9-3ee3 | 6 | pass |
| 242f-cdd1 | 6 | pass |
| 2604-20eb | 7 | pass |
| 2994-16f0 | 7 | pass |
| 2cf2-b06e | 4 | fail |
| 2f7a-7770 | 7 | pass |
| 3023-07b2 | 5 | pass |
| 31b3-e25a | 7 | pass |
| 3c10-2367 | 7 | pass |

**Result: 17/20 pass (85%) — ASSERTION SATISFIED (>=75% required)**

### Short Tickets (desc < 100 chars) — Target: 0 score >=5
All 14 short-description tickets scored 0 — **ASSERTION SATISFIED**

### Threshold Assessment
Current threshold of 5 is well-calibrated. The 3 failing well-formed tickets are story-type tickets missing the expected 'Why' and 'What' section headers — these are legitimate clarity failures, not false positives.

**No threshold adjustment required.**
